commands.narrative:
## 2026-06-06 Daily Report

**No roster changes since yesterday** (144 strategies both days; 138 enabled).

### Headline: Pipeline Stalled — Only 5 Trades Today

diagnose.json verdict is PIPELINE_STALLED: last T+30 callback fired 986 seconds before the snapshot. All four data-quality levels pass — the bot is receiving graduations — but the PriceCollector to StrategyManager callback wiring has gone silent. Today collected 5 trades from 1 graduation (net +0.26 SOL); yesterday ran 1,379 trades. Today's readiness scores reflect yesterday's accumulated totals.

**Operator action needed**: restart or inspect the T+30 callback pipeline. Third stall this week (Jun 3, Jun 5, Jun 6).

### Top Promotion Candidates (yesterday's scores)

| Strategy | Score | n | drop_top3 | monthly | edge flag |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| v9shadow-velmid-liq-mono | 88.8 | 96 | +0.979 SOL | 2.97/mo | STRENGTHENING |
| v9shadow-velmono-dev | 87.2 | 94 | +0.768 SOL | 2.11/mo | STRENGTHENING |
| v25-bot-excl-climbing | 81.5 | 592 | +0.217 SOL | 3.32/mo | — |

None promotable today. The v9 STRENGTHENING pair are 4–6 trades from n=100; v25 needs +0.43 SOL/mo more monthly run rate.

### v9shadow-vel20-top5 Now INVALID

v9shadow-vel20-top5 crossed n=100 and failed: n=102, drop_top3=−0.990 SOL. Apparent +2 SOL profit concentrates in top-3 trades (148%). DECAYING: recent-30 median −11.67% vs all-time −1.48%. Recommend killing v9shadow-vel20-top5.

### Edge Decay Sweep

20 strategies flagged DECAYING. Concentrated in vel20-top5 lineage and climbing-cluster variants. The STRENGTHENING exceptions: v9shadow-velmid-liq-mono (recent30=+5.28%) and v9shadow-velmono-dev (recent30=+4.75%).

### Stale Kill Batches (4–5 Cycles Unanswered)

Four kill batches from Jun 2–5 remain PROPOSED and unexecuted. Roster carries 40+ INVALID strategies dragging daily shadow P&L to −60 to −120 SOL/day. Most urgent: ai-2026-06-05-001 (v32/v28/v33/v34, ESCALATED 3x).

### 7-Day Pattern

Recent daily aggregate profits: −90.7 (Jun 5), −58.9 (Jun 4), −121.1 (Jun 3), +20.9 (Jun 2), −33.3 (Jun 1), −63.5 (May 31), −20.6 (May 30). Chronic negative drag from 100+ losing strategies.

### Operator Priority Order

1. Fix pipeline stall — investigate PriceCollector to StrategyManager T+30 wiring.
2. Execute ai-2026-06-05-001 (v32/v28/v33/v34 kill) and ai-2026-06-02-004 (v41/v42 families).
3. After pipeline recovers — check v9shadow-velmid-liq-mono for n=100 promotion (4 trades away).
